name: Summit Research Scholars

cost.notes: $2,900 total for the 3-week virtual program; financial aid may be available

eligibility.notes: Open to students in grades 8-12; rolling admissions with limited spots

curriculum: Research methodology, Python programming, Statistics, Data science, Research proposal writing, Capstone research project.

blurbs.short: A 3-week virtual research program where high school students develop a capstone research project using Python, statistics, and data science.
blurbs.long: Summit Research Scholars (SRS) is a 3-week virtual summer program for motivated middle and high school students interested in research. Students work through a structured research methodology curriculum, learn Python programming and statistical analysis, and develop an independent research capstone project. The program culminates in a research proposal and presentation. Rolling admissions with limited spots per cohort.
